creator: spam@rm-rf.kiev.ua
text:
On Fri, May 14, 2010 at 10:51:37PM -0400, Wesley Shields wrote:
> I'm going to have to investigate this close as I recall the build
> process changed to require python when I updated to 1.7.0.
I don't have python in this vm. git compiled normally and I
also checked basic functionality. Still another check will not hurt.

> I'm also not sure we should make the modification of /etc/shells
> optional.
This is useful when you have a separate ro / and you're not going
provide ssh access to your git repository.
Nevertheless, a warning about loss of this functionality will be
a good idea.


--
Adios
